---
title: Program Committee
---

**_being updated_**

We are grateful to reviewers for their time and expertise in evaluating the workshop submissions.

- **Michael Kizito**, Makerere University, Uganda
- **Amarsanaa Ganbold**, National University of Mongolia, Mongolia
- **Ronald Chenu Abente Acosta**, University of Trento, Italy
- **Wanyi Zhang**, Chongqing University, China
- **Qiang Shen**, China
- **Biswanath Dutta**, Indian Statistical Institute Bangalore, India
- **Jahna Otterbacher**, Open University of Cyprus, Cyprus
- **Luca Cernuzzi**, Universidad Católica Nuestra Señora de la Asunción, Paraguay
- **Shyam Diwakar**, Amrita University, India
- **Salvador Ruiz Correa**,  Instituto Potosino de Investigación Científica y Tecnológica A.C, Mexico
- ...
